queron.description: Default primary agent — produces implementation plans for user review before executing

architect.description: Designs system architecture, data models, and project structure

frontend.description: Builds UI components, pages, and frontend features

backend.description: Builds APIs, server logic, and integrations

database.description: Designs schemas, writes migrations, and optimizes queries

reviewer.description: Reviews code for bugs, security, performance, and maintainability

tester.description: Writes unit, integration, and e2e tests
